sections.heading: What is Hosting Platforms Overview?
sections.body: Vercel, Netlify, Heroku, Railway, and choosing the right platform. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Hosting Platforms Overview is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Hosting Platforms Overview is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Hosting Platforms Overview every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Hosting Platforms Overview implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Hosting Platforms Overview is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.
